ast.name: setButtonText

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restrict search to recent content. Multi-year options fall back to "year" (the API ceiling).
ast.target: 将搜索限制在近期内容。多年选项会回退到“年”（API 上限）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a citations section with source links — recommended for research notes.
ast.target: 附加一个包含源链接的引用部分——推荐用于研究笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Surface follow-up questions perplexity suggests at the end of the response.
ast.target: 在响应末尾显示 Perplexity 建议的后续问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for long answers. Deep research model can take 30–60s — streaming makes progress visible.
ast.target: 推荐用于长回答。深度研究模型可能需要 30-60 秒——流式传输使进度可见。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write tokens into the note as they arrive — useful for long answers and slow local models.
ast.target: 在令牌到达时将其写入笔记——适用于长回答和慢速本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Upper bound on response length. Local models cap lower than cloud — 2048 is a safe default.
ast.target: 响应长度的上限。本地模型上限低于云端——2048 是安全的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher = more creative / varied. 0.7 is the conventional default. Slide to 0 for deterministic output.
ast.target: 越高 = 越有创意/多样。0.7 是常规默认值。滑动到 0 以获得确定性输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write tokens into the note as they arrive — recommended for long answers and slow local models.
ast.target: 在令牌到达时将其写入笔记——推荐用于长回答和慢速本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls thinking depth and overall token spend. Higher = more thorough; more tokens.
ast.target: 控制思考深度和总体令牌消耗。越高 = 越彻底；令牌越多。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server-side web_search_20250305 tool. Returns per-claim citations attached to text blocks.
ast.target: 服务器端 web_search_20250305 工具。返回附加到文本块的逐声明引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lets Claude reason before answering. Higher quality on complex questions; adds latency and tokens.
ast.target: 让 Claude 在回答前进行推理。复杂问题质量更高；会增加延迟和令牌消耗。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for long answers — avoids HTTP timeouts and writes incrementally to the note.
ast.target: 推荐用于长回答——避免 HTTP 超时并增量写入笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server-side Google_search tool. Emits per-segment grounding supports that survive into citations.
ast.target: 服务器端 Google_search 工具。发出逐段的支撑依据，这些依据会保留在引用中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown bullet list of the queries Gemini ran, each linked to Google search.
ast.target: Gemini 运行的查询的 Markdown 项目符号列表，每个都链接到 Google 搜索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resolve Google grounding redirects to durable source urls. Off = fast but citations expire in ~30 days.
ast.target: 将 Google 支撑重定向解析为持久的源 URL。关闭 = 快速但引用在约 30 天后过期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a citations section with source links — recommended for research articles.
ast.target: 附加一个包含源链接的引用部分——推荐用于研究文章。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for articles — see content as it generates. Note: Deep research with streaming may not support images.
ast.target: 推荐用于文章——在生成时查看内容。注意：带流式传输的深度研究可能不支持图片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which template to apply to this file.
ast.target: 要应用于此文件的模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: Perplexity 服务的 API 端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your perplexity API key (required for remote service)
ast.target: 您的 Perplexity API 密钥（远程服务必需）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the query header in generated articles
ast.target: 在生成的文章中放置查询标题的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: JSON template for perplexity API requests
ast.target: Perplexity API 请求的 JSON 模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Anthropic API key. Read from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env if set; can be overridden here.
ast.target: 您的 Anthropic API 密钥。如果已设置，从 .env 中的 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 读取；可在此处覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default model used by the ask Claude command. Recommended: Claude-opus-4-7.
ast.target: “询问 Claude”命令使用的默认模型。推荐：Claude-opus-4-7。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google AI studio API key. Generate one in Google AI studio.
ast.target: 您的 Google AI Studio API 密钥。在 Google AI Studio 中生成一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default model used by the ask Gemini command. Recommended: Gemini flash (latest) — free-tier friendly.
ast.target: “询问 Gemini”命令使用的默认模型。推荐：Gemini flash（最新版）——对免费层级友好。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sends the Google_search tool with every request. Disable to get ungrounded model knowledge only.
ast.target: 每次请求都发送 Google_search 工具。禁用以仅获取未接地的模型知识。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Appends a Markdown "Google searches" section listing the queries Gemini ran, each linked to Google search. Markdown-native substitute for the Google grounding chip (which is inline-styled HTML that Obsidian can't render cleanly).
ast.target: 附加一个 Markdown “Google 搜索”部分，列出 Gemini 运行的查询，每个都链接到 Google 搜索。Markdown 原生替代 Google 支撑芯片（它是内联样式的 HTML，Obsidian 无法清晰渲染）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Google's grounding redirect urls expire ~30 days after the response. With this on, the plugin resolves each redirect to the real source URL before writing the citations footer. Costs one HTTP request per cited source (parallelized, 3s timeout each).
ast.target: Google 的支撑重定向 URL 在响应后约 30 天过期。启用此选项后，插件会在写入引用页脚之前将每个重定向解析为真实源 URL。每个被引用的源会花费一个 HTTP 请求（并行化，每个超时 3 秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API endpoint for your local perplexica / vane instance
ast.target: 您的本地 Perplexica / Vane 实例的 API 端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Alternative endpoint for docker container setups
ast.target: Docker 容器设置的备用端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default AI model for perplexica / vane to use
ast.target: Perplexica / Vane 使用的默认 AI 模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: JSON template for perplexica / vane API requests
ast.target: Perplexica / Vane API 请求的 JSON 模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API endpoint for your local lm studio instance
ast.target: 您的本地 LM Studio 实例的 API 端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default model name for lm studio to use
ast.target: LM Studio 使用的默认模型名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: JSON template for lm studio API requests
ast.target: LM Studio API 请求的 JSON 模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Placeholder text for perplexity query input
ast.target: Perplexity 查询输入的占位符文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Placeholder text for perplexica / vane query input
ast.target: Perplexica / Vane 查询输入的占位符文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Placeholder text for lm studio query input
ast.target: LM Studio 查询输入的占位符文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Placeholder text for lm studio system prompt input
ast.target: LM Studio 系统提示词输入的占位符文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Placeholder text for article generator term input
ast.target: 文章生成器术语输入的占位符文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for generating articles. Use {TERM} as placeholder for the term.
ast.target: 生成文章的模板。使用 {TERM} 作为术语的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for generating articles with Deep Research model. Use {TERM} as placeholder for the term.
ast.target: 使用深度研究模型生成文章的模板。使用 {TERM} 作为术语的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompt added to queries when images are enabled
ast.target: 启用图片时添加到查询的提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for enhancing selected text. Use {TEXT} as placeholder for the selected text.
ast.target: 增强所选文本的模板。使用 {TEXT} 作为所选文本的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for requesting related images for selected text. Use {TEXT} as placeholder for the selected text.
ast.target: 请求所选文本相关图片的模板。使用 {TEXT} 作为所选文本的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder where directory templates live.
ast.target: 目录模板所在的库相对文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder where reusable snippets live. Templates pull them in with {{include: name}}.
ast.target: 可重用代码片段所在的库相对文件夹。模板通过 {{include: name}} 引入它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder where plugin-wide preambles live. Files here are auto-attached to every perplexity request per the lists below.
ast.target: 插件范围前言所在的库相对文件夹。此处的文件会根据下面的列表自动附加到每个 Perplexity 请求。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated preamble names (no .md) prepended to every system prompt, in order. Default: inline-citation.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的前言名称（不含 .md），按顺序添加到每个系统提示词前。默认：inline-citation。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated user-prompt preambles. Append ":return-images" to attach only when a template sets return-images: true. Default: research-framing, image-placement:return-images.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的用户提示词前言。附加“:return-images”以仅在模板设置 return-images: true 时附加。默认：research-framing, image-placement:return-images。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys passed to the template as {{frontmatter}}. Other keys are filtered out.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的 frontmatter 键列表，作为 {{frontmatter}} 传递给模板。其他键将被过滤掉。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write any shipped template files that are missing from the templates root. Existing files are never overwritten — to reset a template to its shipped default, delete the file first then re-seed.
ast.target: 写入任何缺失于模板根目录的已发布模板文件。现有文件永远不会被覆盖——要将模板重置为其发布默认值，请先删除文件，然后重新播种。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of images to embed per invocation.
ast.target: 每次调用可嵌入的最大图片数量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure settings for the hosted perplexity AI service
ast.target: 配置托管 perplexity AI 服务的设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure Claude API access. Web-search citations supported in this iteration; document-grounded citations are deferred.
ast.target: 配置 Claude API 访问。此版本支持网络搜索引用；文档引用已延后。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure Gemini API access. The Google_search tool emits per-segment grounding supports that map text spans to source urls — the per-claim attribution Claude's dynamic-filter pass loses.
ast.target: 配置 Gemini API 访问。Google_search 工具提供分段支持，将文本跨度映射到源 URL — 这是 Claude 动态过滤过程中丢失的逐声明归因。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Apply a template (heading skeleton + per-section bullets) to fill a file via perplexity deep research. Templates live in a vault folder and are matched to files by glob.
ast.target: 应用模板（标题骨架 + 各部分要点）通过 perplexity 深度研究填充文件。模板存放在保险库文件夹中，并通过 glob 匹配到文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Highlight a passage, run "find images for selection". The plugin asks perplexity for screenshots that visually illustrate the passage, prefers images on the entity's domain (frontmatter URL), and embeds them between paragraphs.
ast.target: 高亮一段文字，运行“为选区查找图片”。插件会请求 perplexity 提供视觉上说明该段落的截图，优先选择实体域名（前置 URL）上的图片，并将它们嵌入段落之间。
